title: Gilded Netherite
description: Swim in lava with your new armor
body:
Please do download the mod above. It is a required library for most Quilt mods to work.


Featuring:

 

  • Gilded Netherite Template

 

 

  • Gilded Netherite: a gold plated netherite ingot.

 

 

 

  • Gilded Netherite Armor Set: Lava scuba suit. Piglins don't get mad!

 

 

 

  • Golden Porkchop: 7s Instant Health, 10s Fire Resistance.

 

 

You're free to add this to your modpack! Our only conditions are that you don't change any assets, and link to this page somewhere if you redistribute it.

 

THIS IS A QUILT MOD! <3

 

- Okay, but how do I use Quilt?

 

You go to https://quiltmc.org/en/install/ and click on the "universal" option. It installs like any other modloader.

You will also (probably) need QSL for mods to work. You can get it here or click on the Quilt image at the very top of this page.

 

- What about my Fabric mods?!

 

All Fabric mods are compatible with Quilt! Using Quilt will not prevent you from loading any Fabric mods, you can add as many as you want and use both Fabric and Quilt mods by just installing Quilt.

 

- Will you continue to update for Fabric?

 

No. There's really no need for it since Quilt loads Fabric mods anyways. You will always be able to load your Fabric mods on Quilt :)

 

 

If you need support, please contact us through our Discord:
